summary: CSS Layout Verification PASSED: Pet selector (Lola) is now positioned on the FAR RIGHT of the header as requested. CSS change verified: .mp-header-inner max-width changed from 1200px to 100% with space-between layout.

mobile_viewport_390x844.layout: PASS - Mira logo on left, pet selector on right

context_for_next_testing_agent: Pet selector positioning fix verified: CSS .mp-header-inner now uses max-width: 100% instead of 1200px, allowing pet selector to be positioned at the far right of the header using flexbox space-between. Tested on tablet (768x1024) and mobile (390x844) viewports - both show pet selector correctly positioned at far right.
